title: ferray-ufunc: no clip for integer types — requires Float bound
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

clip() in floatintrinsic.rs requires T: Element + Float. NumPy's np.clip works on any ordered type including integers: np.clip(int_arr, 0, 255). The implementation only uses comparison operators (< and >), not any float-specific operations. Relax the bound to T: Element + PartialOrd + Copy.
